sizing_rule.note: Reduce position to 50% of normal size when cumulative drawdown from peak remains below 10% and win rate >= 40%, to maintain discipline during psychological discouragement while preserving capital for recovery phase (15-trade recovery threshold before resuming full sizing at 50% win rate)

source_rule_text: A trader must execute their mechanical trading plan consistently despite psychological discouragement, because missing the biggest trades of the year often results in unprofitable years regardless of edge quality.
